purpose: Adds the six removeMember* Copy keys (button/title/body/confirm/success/error) for the new Remove Member affordance, distinct in framing from the existing cancelInvite* (rescind-an-invite) copy, for both en and de locales.

public_api.name: Copy.groups.removeMemberButton
public_api.description: Member-list row button label for removing an established (non-pending) member.

public_api.name: Copy.groups.removeMemberTitle
public_api.description: Confirm-dialog header for the Remove Member action.

public_api.name: Copy.groups.removeMemberBody
public_api.description: Confirm-dialog body copy explaining the consequence of removing a member.

public_api.name: Copy.groups.removeMemberSuccess
public_api.description: Success toast shown after a member is removed.

public_api.name: Copy.groups.removeMemberError
public_api.description: Error toast shown when member removal fails.

owned_data: The six removeMember* Copy type declarations and their en/de string literal values in app/src/lib/i18n.ts
